name: The Subsurface Reclaims
reasoning: V3 best fulfills the prompt's core requirement of "fallen warrior bodies" being reclaimed by bioluminescent plants. It explicitly shows multiple humanoid corpses/skeletons integrated into the overgrown dungeon floor, directly matching the transformation theme. V1 and V2 feature only abstract plant-covered lumps without clear warrior anatomy, missing the crucial hybrid plant-creature element. V3 also delivers superior composition with clear focal point (central glowing light), excellent layered depth, rich earth tones with vibrant green bioluminescence, and maintains stylized digital illustration quality appropriate for card art at small size.

artifacts_found.issue: Fallen bodies lack clear warrior anatomy—appear as generic plant-covered mounds rather than recognizable humanoid forms being transformed into hybrid creatures
Similar issue to v1: bodies are too abstract and sculptural, not clearly depicting warriors or the transformation process described in prompt
